creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Took wen@'s attachment, cleaned it up a bit, posted at review D49680. Feel free to test for any showstoppers.

Amongst other new features [0] are experimental free-threaded/Global Interpreter Lock-disabled support and JIT compiler. They are to be exposed but not enabled by default in the port.

[0] https://docs.python.org/3/whatsnew/3.13.html
